values.value: Flags LoginAs impersonation events (admin assuming another user's session) that occurred outside business hours, defined as 08:00 through 18:00. Off-hours admin impersonation is a high-signal anomaly because legitimate support sessions almost always happen during normal business hours.

Identify the impersonating admin and confirm the session was authorized (ticket, on-call rotation, scheduled maintenance). If unexplained, revoke the admin's session, rotate credentials, and review actions taken during the impersonation window in Setup Audit Trail and field history.
